provenance: Corner-case dataset from naturalistic driving (Jilin Univ., Smart Cities 2025), RoadRunner-exported OpenX
artifact_rules_justification: results/TRIAGE_v0.3.0.md — two verified export/reconstruction defects: (1) placeholder first frame jumping 11 m in one 40 ms sample to the real track start (DYN-005, 274 m/s); (2) synthetic eased stops: exponential velocity decay (37->0 m/s, factor ~0.895 per 40 ms sample, tau~0.36 s) = 6-9 g sustained deceleration with no crash-pulse shape — a smoothing/easing filter, not vehicle dynamics (DYN-006). True defects of the RoadRunner reconstruction pipeline, not tool mistakes.
